item.name: Payments
item.description: Accept payments (create, capture) and inbound provider webhooks.

item.name: Payment Links
item.description: Shareable payment links — fixed or payer-entered amount.

item.name: Checkout
item.description: Public hosted-checkout — pay a link by its code, no API key.

item.name: Orchestration
item.description: Smart provider routing — scorecards and cost basis.

item.name: Payouts
item.description: Single and bulk payouts under maker-checker approval.

item.name: Ledger
item.description: Double-entry ledger accounts and balanced journal entries.

item.name: Billing
item.description: Plans, subscriptions, invoices and usage metering.

item.name: Mandates
item.description: Recurring mandates and idempotent mandate debits.

item.name: Dunning
item.description: Failed-payment retry rules and attempt history.

item.name: E-Invoicing (IRN)
item.description: IRP registration for IRN + signed QR.

item.name: Virtual Accounts
item.description: Per-customer virtual accounts with auto-reconciled credits.

item.name: Cross-Border
item.description: Export invoices and inward FX remittances (FIRA).

item.name: Analytics
item.description: TPV, MRR/ARR, success rate and cash-flow forecasting.

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Webhook endpoint registration and delivery history.

description.content: (This can only be one of OPEN,DISMISSED,ESCALATED)
(This can only be one of OPEN,DISMISSED,ESCALATED)

Qeet Pay — India-first payments, billing and GST infrastructure (UPI / Cards / NACH). Programmatic `/v1` calls authenticate with a `qp_live_` / `qp_test_` API key via the `X-Api-Key` header; money is always in integer minor units (paise).
